title: Who's Calling?!

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
a single or multi-message switch
record:
a phone ringtone noise on it

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. The switch user pranks people by pressing the switch to make the ring tone play.
2. Encourage them to press again with comments like "who's phone
keeps ringing?" or "not again!"

tooltipText: Prank people by making a phone ringtone noise with the switch!
